summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ECOMMBX Banking Application header layout fix and admin features. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.

Backend: Admin get users (41 users retrieved)
Backend: Admin get accounts with IBAN/BIC (29 accounts)

Backend: Ticket subject editing
Backend: Ticket message editing

Backend: Notification bell - Card requests (5 pending)

Frontend: Admin login successful
Frontend: User login successful

Frontend: Header layout - Using justify-between for proper spacing
Frontend: Notification bell shows badge with count (14 items)

Frontend: Notification bell - KYC notification item present
Frontend: Notification bell - Card requests notification item present
Frontend: Notification bell - Pending transfers notification item present
Frontend: Notification bell - Support tickets notification item present
Frontend: Notification bell - Mark All as Read button works
Frontend: Notification bell - Clear All button works

details: Section title (e.g., 'Users', 'Support') displayed on LEFT side
ECOMMBX badge positioned next to section title with proper spacing (ml-4)
Bell icon positioned in FAR RIGHT corner
Using justify-between CSS class for proper spacing between left and right elements
Layout verified through screenshots and DOM inspection
Badge shows correct count (14 items)
Dropdown opens and closes smoothly
All 4 notification categories present: KYC (1), Cards (5), Transfers (1), Tickets (7)
Mark All as Read button present and functional
Clear All button present and functional
Clicking notification items navigates to correct admin section
Auto-refresh message displayed (every 30 seconds)
Users tab: Loads with table showing 41 users
Accounts tab: Loads with 29 Edit IBAN buttons
Support Tickets tab: Loads with 8 tickets (named 'Support Tickets' in sidebar)
Transfers Queue tab: Loads with SUBMITTED/COMPLETED/REJECTED tabs
KYC Queue tab: Loads correctly
Card Requests tab: Loads correctly
Overview tab: Loads with charts
Edit IBAN modal: Opens, displays user info, IBAN, BIC fields, closes properly
Support ticket editing: Edit subject and message buttons present and functional
ECOMMBX and Support labels visible in ticket messages
Rejection reason displayed in Transfers Queue for rejected transfers
Sidebar displays 'ECOMMBX' label
No 'SUPER_ADMIN' text visible
All navigation items accessible
